title: GERMANUS Metal Cigarette Rolling Machine - Premium, Black
features: GERMANUS Rollbox for Cigarettes, Model Premium
GERMANUS - Only Original with the Eagle.
Stands out by its specially sturdy manufactured quality.
Specially thick metal and a corresponding high quality coating in Black with rounded edges. It's designed for 70 mm Cigarette Papers. Diameter can be selected of 6 mm / 8 mm.

Including Instructions in Pictures and in Video. Please watch the videos linked in the product instructions manual, our FAQ included in product description and in the product manual. The Rolling strap can be replaced. This machine can therefore be used for a long time. Delivery of course without tobacco.
description: GERMANUS Rollbox for CIgarettes, Model Premium GERMANUS - Only Original with the Eagle. Our Cigarette Machine Model Premium stands out by its specially sturdy manufactured quality. For this machine we used specially thick metal and a corresponding high quality coating in Black with rounded edges. It's designed for 70 mm Cigarette Papers. Diameter can be selected of 6 mm / 8 mm Including Instructions in Pictures and in Video. The Rolling strap can be replaced. This machine can therefore be used for a long time. Delivery of course without tobacco. For information on how to use the product, please refer to the instructions enclosed with the product. It also contains videos showing the process in motion. The use is actually very simple. Question: The pin does not move. Answer: One side of the rolling tape should be fixed, the other side runs freely in the guide rail. Please also see the video linked in the product instructions for more information. Question: The machine does not work. Answer: Please watch the videos linked in the instructions. Please also read the FAQ in the product instructions. These provide answers to frequently asked questions. Question: The belt jumps out. Answer: The belt is held in position during filling. It is correct that the belt of the machine hangs out when empty. Question: The machine does not roll well. Answer: Please vary the filling volume. Make sure that the machine is neither overfilled nor underfilled.
